title: Infosys collaborates with RWE AG on automated digital workplace transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with RWE AG, a German multinational energy company, to drive automated digital workplace transformation and improve operational efficiency. The collaboration will use Infosys Workplace Suite to automate processes and enable self-service options, supporting RWE's operational excellence efforts. Infosys said it has worked with RWE for over 12 years and will support the modernization of RWE's workplace with a focus on user centricity and sustainability. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.
